mapper.sql: aas.uuid as "uuid", aas.alert_key as "alertKey", aas.is_active as "active", aas.activated_at as "activatedAt", aas.deactivated_at as "deactivatedAt", aas.updated_at as "updatedAt"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM admin_alert_status aas ORDER BY aas.activated_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_alert_status ( uuid, alert_key, is_active, activated_at, deactivated_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{dto.uuid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.alertKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.active, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{dto.activatedAt, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dto.deactivatedAt, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dto.updatedAt, jdbcType=BIGINT} )
